source: Weapons & armor are the canonical tables from MÖRK BORG Bare Bones Edition, p.22-23. Entry order matches the random roll (index 0 = roll 1) so class weapon_die / armor_die select the correct slice. Rations & trinkets are GM flavor.

armor.name: Medium
armor.absorb: -d4 damage, +2 DR Agility tests including defence

armor.name: Heavy
armor.absorb: -d6 damage, +4 DR Agility tests, defence is DR+2

trinkets: A length of dirty rope (30 feet).
An iron lantern, oil for Presence + 6 hours.
